name: moat_comparison — audit_corrections_2026_06_24
what_it_solves: Corrections applied on 2026-06-24 to earlier drafts of moat_comparison.json.
why_it_exists: Correction lock: every edit that changed a moat_status is inspectable so nothing quietly flips PARITY→EDGE.

corrections_applied: Dim 1: Added 'PDF Introduction page 2' source location for 'Unlike cell viability screenings' verbatim quote.
Dim 3: Restored full-precision values for all 4 stress tests + primary endpoint (Δ to 16 sig figs, p-values exact, Cohen's d exact) — matches canonical_atr_wee1_rerun.json frozen 2026-04-05.
Dim 5: Added 3 verbatim Bev2026 quotes with page citations: Results page 5 header, Ref 7 Engstrom 2023, Ref 8 Pettus 2025.
Dim 6: Added 3 verbatim Bev2026 quotes with page citations: Methods page 14 PDO clinical history, Methods page 14 bi-directional editing, Results page 8 rescue finding.
Dim 8 (NEW): Synergy quantification — added Fig 3 caption verbatim with page 7 source. SynergyFinder 3.1 vs ref 21 (3.0) distinction noted.

Dim 9 (NEW): MTAP-loss prevalence attribution — 3 verbatim quotes (Intro p.2, Results p.2, Discussion p.12) explicitly disambiguating 26% (Bev2026 MTAP-codeletion) vs 22% (Robertson 2017 CDKN2A-alone).
Removed any implicit claim that CrisPRO 'verified' or 'reproduced' the 26% figure — it is Bev2026's own analysis.
Audit checked attribution drift: 0 concerns. All quantitative claims trace to verified transcript receipts or verified PDF text. Repo state qualified with 'HEAD bfd6d11f'.
claims_remaining_in_quarantine: None in moat_comparison.json. All quantitative claims either cite verbatim verbatim or are explicitly labeled as inferences.
claims_NOT_made_in_this_document: Wet-lab competitor comparisons (Mirati Phase II, Agios Phase I, etc.) — explicitly out of scope per competitor_landscape_not_assessed_this_session block.
Specific resolution recommendation for MRTX1719 bug — only the bug location and correct mapping per Bev2026 are stated; whether to fix or not remains the user's call per lock #4.
raw.full_precision_audit_pass: All canonical receipt values present at full precision: 0.7324529879649893 (delta), 0.05564297952485164 (AUC delta), 1.0692019443383756 (TP53 delta), 0.045165724128583974 (LOO max p), n=619 (TP53 strat WT).
caveat_blocks_added: MOAT-CAV-001 (reproducibility-as-moat contingent on PC-02 + n=942/n=914 + repo-state-temporal qualification)
